news.title: ASML: Not Cheap, But The 2027-28 Setup Looks Real (Upgrade)
news.summary: ASML Holding N.V. upgraded to Buy as semi capex cycle builds for 2027-28. Click for this updated look at ASML stock following the latest earnings release.

news.title: ASML’s €12b Buyback Links AI Equipment Demand To Capital Returns
news.summary: ASML Holding (ENXTAM:ASML) has launched a new €12b share buyback program alongside record demand for its semiconductor equipment. The latest quarterly order intake was far ahead of expectations, with management pointing to sustained demand tied to AI-related chip production. Company leaders describe an AI-driven growth outlook that they view as durable, aligning capital returns with strong current business conditions. ASML Holding, trading at €1,217.6, sits at the center of the high end...

news.title: BofA Sees Limited China Risk for ASML Holding N.V. (ASML), Maintains Top Pick Rating
news.summary: ASML Holding N.V. (NASDAQ:ASML) is one of the AI Stocks in Focus on Wall Street. On January 27, BofA Securities analyst Didier Scemama reiterated a Buy rating on the stock with a $1,672.00 price target. The firm maintains its “Top Pick” stance on ASML, seeing limited China threat and highlighting inflection in edge AI. Bofa highlighted […]

news.summary: ASML Holding NV (ASML) reports impressive Q4 2025 results with EUR9.7 billion in net sales and a solid EUR38.8 billion backlog, setting a strong foundation for future revenue.

news.title: ASML Holding N.V. (ASML): A Bull Case Theory
news.summary: We came across a bullish thesis on ASML Holding N.V. on Arya’s Substack by Arya. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on ASML. ASML Holding N.V.’s share was trading at $1,454.59 as of January 27th. ASML’s trailing and forward P/E were 50.55 and 45.66 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. ASML Holding N.V. news.title: ASML Reports Record Orders Amid AI Chip Boom. The Stock Is Dropping.
news.summary: Orders for the December quarter were nearly double what analysts had forecast amid optimism about artificial intelligence.

news.title: ASML Stock Falls Despite Strong Sales Forecast For 2026
news.summary: Semiconductor equipment giant ASML provided a strong outlook for the current quarter and full year ahead. But ASML stock fell.

news.title: Why Monolithic Power Systems (MPWR) Stock Is Up Today
news.summary: Shares of power management chips maker Monolithic Power Systems (NASDAQ:MPWR) jumped 5.7% in the afternoon session after a broad rally in the semiconductor sector lifted shares as industry bellwether ASML reported strong earnings and a positive outlook.
